title: Signpost
description: Adds sign posts for decoration and teleportation (optional).
body:
![A sign post in a village](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7df80a16318b765390129d0dde9e69ad0f663b73.png)

Adds configurable sign posts. They can be used as decoration or to teleport to waystones (teleportation can be disabled in the config files).

Includes integration into the [Antique Atlas](https://modrinth.com/project/wHODup9j) (version >= 2.01.0).

Supports [Repurposed Structures](https://modrinth.com/project/muf0XoRe) villages.  

Also supporting the [Waystones](https://modrinth.com/project/LOpKHB2A) mod (except 1.17).

**Getting started in survival:** Just craft a normal vanilla sign. All recipes should then be added to your recipe book over time.

**zh\_cn** localization by **[TartaricAcid](https://github.com/TartaricAcid)** (Version 1.\*) and **[SettingDust](https://github.com/SettingDust)** (Version 2.\*)  
**ru\_ru** localization by **Aqelius** (Version 1.\*) and **[lineisover](https://github.com/lineisover)** (Version 2.\*)

Please backup your maps, report any bugs and have fun :D

You may include this mod in modpacks.

![A large sign](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2eae73943b4874472c8c6cfbc965402b789d9876_0.webp)
![Nether Signs](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/80414240f5482b49b71c03435e54f94f1a82ff11_0.webp)
